sizing_rule.note: Fixed dollar allocation per trade (e.g., $20/week) creates inverse price weighting: Position Units = Fixed Dollar Amount / Current Price. Automatically buys more shares at lower prices and fewer at higher prices. No optimal_f or kelly parameters specified by author.

source_rule_text: Allocate a fixed dollar amount to each trade regardless of price level, which automatically adjusts position size inversely to price—buying more units when prices are lower and fewer when prices are higher.
